subject: Continuous Random Variables
question: Find $E(X)$ when the density function of $X$ is $f(x) = \begin{cases} 2x & \text{if } 0 \le x \le 1 \\ 0 & \text{otherwise.} \end{cases}$
explanation: Using the formula for $E(X)$ we find $E(X) = \int_{-\infty}^\infty x f(x)\,dx = \int_0^1 2x^2\,dx = \frac{2}{3}$
